products.name: Custom Composite Sandwich Panels
products.descriptor: Custom lightweight sandwich panels with honeycomb or foam cores and composite face sheets

evidence.snippet:
---------------
We manufacture high-quality sandwich panels using advanced composite prepreg bonded to lightweight core materials like honeycomb or foam. Our sandwich panels offer extremely high strength and stiffness to weight ratios.
[Learn More](https://acpcomposites.com/sandwich-panels)
Custom composite sandwich panels, laminates, tubes, rods, and formed structures

products.name: AL-X Aluminum Sandwich Panels
products.descriptor: Aluminum-faced sandwich panel family for aerospace structural applications

evidence.snippet:
ACP Composites produces lightweight, high-strength sandwich panels by bonding composite prepreg to honeycomb or foam cores. Available in AL-X Aluminum, carbon fiber, and fiberglass, these panels deliver exceptional stiffness-to-weight performance for aerospace and automotive applications.
[Learn More »](https://acpcomposites.com/sandwich-panels)

products.name: Carbon Fiber Laminates
products.descriptor: Carbon fiber laminate sheets in stock and custom configurations

evidence.snippet: *   [Carbon Fiber Laminates](https://acpcomposites.com/category/sheets-laminates/carbon-fiber-sheets)

products.name: Carbon Fiber Tubing
products.descriptor: Lightweight carbon fiber tubes in roll-wrapped, pultruded, and filament-wound variants

evidence.snippet: *   [Carbon Fiber Tubing](https://acpcomposites.com/category/tubes-rods/carbon-fiber-tubes)

ACP Composites manufactures lightweight, high-strength composite tubes and rods using carbon fiber, fiberglass, and Kevlar. Produced via roll wrapping, pultrusion, or filament winding, these tubes maintain tight tolerances, outperform metals, and support machining, cutting, and finishing across diverse applications.
[Learn More »](https://acpcomposites.com/product-specialties#tubes)

products.name: Custom Composite Formed Structures
products.descriptor: Complex custom-formed composite structures in carbon fiber, fiberglass, and Kevlar

evidence.snippet:
Formed Structures
-----------------
We utilize composite materials to form complex and highly toleranced structures ranging from small parts to large assemblies. Our formed structures excel in industries requiring high-performance.
[Custom Quote](https://acpcomposites.com/request-for-quote)

products.name: Custom Composite Assemblies
products.descriptor: Multi-piece composite assemblies with bonding, hardware installation, and component sourcing

evidence.snippet:
Assemblies
----------
ACP Composites’ full complement of assembly services, including component sourcing, precision bonding, hardware installation and assembly of multi-piece composite parts, sets us apart as your assembly specialist.
[Custom Quote](https://acpcomposites.com/request-for-quote)

products.name: Fuselages, Empennages, & Nosecones
products.descriptor: Custom build-to-print UAV fuselages, empennages, and nosecones in composite materials

evidence.snippet:
Fuselages, Empennages, & Nosecones
----------------------------------
ACP Composites expertly crafts fuselages, empennages, and nosecones to your exact specifications and weight targets. With seamless  integrations and proven manufacturing processes, we help your UAV fly lighter, smarter, faster, and farther.

products.name: Wings & Stabilizers
products.descriptor: Custom build-to-print UAV wings and stabilizers engineered for lift, strength, and efficiency

evidence.snippet:
Wings & Stabilizers
-------------------
Take your UAV to new heights with wings and stabilizers engineered for optimal lift, strength, and efficiency. ACP Composites delivers ultralight, rigid airfoils with accurate control surfaces and versatile payload mounts manufactured to spec and backed by our quality assurance.

products.name: Optical Domes & Enclosures
products.descriptor: Custom composite optical domes and enclosures for UAV sensor protection and multi-wavelength visibility

evidence.snippet:
Optical Domes & Enclosures
--------------------------
Unlock peak sensor performance with crystal-clear optical domes and durable enclosures designed for multi-wavelength visibility. ACP’s manufacturing services provide additional environmental protection and interference shielding, giving your sensors the clearest possible view.

products.name: Hatches, Covers & Fairings
products.descriptor: Custom build-to-print UAV hatches, covers, and fairings for aerodynamic efficiency

evidence.snippet:
Hatches, Covers & Fairings
--------------------------
Streamline your UAV with custom hatches, covers, and fairings built for aerodynamic efficiency. ACP builds  your precision-fit components, scalable from prototype to production, with reliable seals and smart thermal design to reduce drag and boost range.

products.name: Assemblies & Integrations
products.descriptor: Flight-ready UAV composite assemblies integrating control systems, sensors, and payloads

evidence.snippet:
Assemblies & Integrations
-------------------------
ACP Composites seamlessly integrates control systems, communications, sensors, and payloads with high-strength structures producing flight-ready components. With bonded inserts and fully assembled airframes, we simplify your build and accelerate deployment.
